text: As I cross the threshold into this modern exhibition space, glass walls dividing environments, my reflection scattered by the angles and lights, I feel a subtle anticipation. There is a curious harmony between the mundanity of the fire extinguisher and hose—constant reminders of human vulnerability—and the lively swirl of design and information inside the room. Entering further, the wall marked R + D speaks of responsive, evolving efforts to merge human and machine. In this space dedicated to the pursuit of knowledge and progress, I sense both optimism and the weight of the questions that drive us. I feel alert, eager to engage, and quietly humbled by the constant search for understanding.
